prompt: Create a vibrant full-body anime character illustration of Neo Alice, a cheerful Alice-in-wonderland-inspired video-world girl in a bright cyan, white, and gold palette. She is a young blonde girl with very long flowing hair, sparkling blue eyes with star highlights, a wide open smile, a large navy bow on her head, tall white rabbit ears, and a small blue X hair clip. She reaches one hand toward the viewer in an inviting pose while stepping forward, wearing a white dress with pale blue trim, a black spade emblem on the skirt, a pale blue flared cape-like coat, dark navy ribbon bow at the collar, navy cuffs, white lace-up sneakers, and a gold pocket-watch pendant containing a blue play-button icon. Surround her with a whimsical digital Wonderland background: count 3 visible playing cards, including an ace of spades on the left, an ace of hearts near the upper right, and a card with a blue pixel/tree symbol near the lower left; count 1 large round clock at the upper left; count 3 curling blue film strips winding around the scene; count 1 arched portal on the right showing a white castle silhouette and checkerboard path; count many floating square pixels and sparkle shapes in blue, white, and yellow. The floor is a dynamic blue-and-white checkerboard perspective, with abstract video-frame motifs, pixel blocks, and geometric shapes. Use clean glossy anime line art, soft cel shading, energetic composition, high-key lighting, crisp details, playful magical atmosphere, and a vertical poster format with the character centered and slightly tilted for motion. Use dominant colors sky blue, white, navy, and gold, with the mood bright, whimsical, and energetic.
